summary: A truck travels alongside a sedan on a wet road under overcast skies. The truck maintains a steady pace while the sedan overtakes it, passing closely beside the truck.

events_timeline.event: The truck travels alongside a sedan on a wet road under overcast skies. The truck maintains a steady pace while the sedan overtakes it, passing closely beside the truck.

uncertainties: The speed of the sedan is not clearly measurable.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
